sentences.arabic: ذَهَبَتْ أُمُّ كَرِيمٍ إِلَى السُّوقِ لِشِرَاءِ الخُضَارِ.
sentences.translation: Kerimova mama je otišla na pijacu kupiti povrće.
sentences.translationEn: Karim's mother went to the market to buy vegetables.

sentences.arabic: سَأَلَتِ البَائِعَ عَنْ سِعْرِ الطَّمَاطِمِ وَالبَطَاطِسِ.
sentences.translation: Upitala je prodavača za cijenu paradajza i krompira.
sentences.translationEn: She asked the seller about the price of tomatoes and potatoes.

sentences.arabic: وَجَدَتِ السِّعْرَ مُنَاسِبًا فَاشْتَرَتْ كَمِّيَّةً كَافِيَةً.
sentences.translation: Smatrala je cijenu odgovarajućom i kupila dovoljnu količinu.
sentences.translationEn: She found the price reasonable and bought a sufficient quantity.

sentences.translation: Platila je cijenu i zahvalila prodavaču.
sentences.translationEn: She paid the price and thanked the seller.
